project.title: The Only Farmer Who Read the Fine Print — When the Bank Came He Was the One Smiling
project.description: Asher Merrifield, nông dân Iowa 58 tuổi, đọc hết hợp đồng 400 trang của ngân hàng Iron Ridge và tìm ra điều khoản 7-C buộc ngân hàng phải trả anh 1,245,600 đô khi tịch thu nhà trong hạn hán.

style: photorealistic cinematic film still, 35mm film look, natural skin texture, soft depth of field
flashback_style: soft warm vignette, slightly faded colors, dreamy atmosphere

video_hook.video_style: photorealistic cinematic footage, 35mm film look, natural motion, smooth stabilized camera

characters.name: Asher Merrifield
characters.description: 58-year-old man, weathered third-generation Iowa farmer, short gray hair, deep-set tired eyes, gray stubble, tan canvas work jacket over a faded olive green plaid flannel shirt, worn blue denim jeans, calloused hands

characters.name: Philip Granger
characters.description: late-thirties man, sleek regional bank vice president, slicked-back dark brown hair, clean-shaven, charcoal gray tailored Italian suit, silver silk tie, polished condescending expression

characters.name: Sarah Merrifield
characters.description: 55-year-old woman, gentle warm face, auburn hair streaked with silver pulled back in a low bun, soft powder blue cardigan over a cream blouse, thin reading glasses, calm patient eyes

characters.name: Samuel Higgins
characters.description: 65-year-old man, white-haired small-town lawyer, bushy white eyebrows, brown suspenders over a wrinkled white dress shirt, loosened brown tie, weathered kindly face

characters.name: Victor Caldwell
characters.description: early-sixties man, silver-haired bank CEO, clean-shaven, sharp navy blue pinstripe suit, gold cufflinks, cold composed expression

characters.name: Ricky Voss
characters.description: fifty-year-old man, corporate chief legal counsel, receding gray hair, rimless glasses, dark charcoal three-piece suit, burgundy tie, calculating expression

characters.name: Nolan Abernathy
characters.description: 55-year-old man, broad-shouldered neighbor farmer, thinning brown hair, gray stubble, faded blue denim jacket over a brown work shirt, weary defeated eyes

characters.name: Walter Brennan
characters.description: 72-year-old man, gruff cooperative weighmaster, deeply lined face, white stubble, faded red plaid flannel shirt, green Pioneer Seed cap, wire-rimmed glasses

characters.name: Darian Collins
characters.description: late-thirties man, sharp urban forensic accountant, neat short black hair, clean-shaven, slim navy blue business suit, thin silver-framed glasses, tense focused expression

characters.name: Judge Whitman
characters.description: sixties man, dignified federal judge, balding gray hair, wire-rimmed glasses, black judicial robe, stern measured expression

characters.name: Kirkland
characters.description: seventies man, frail elderly farmer, sparse white hair, deeply weathered face, faded brown barn coat over a gray flannel shirt, slow tired posture

characters.name: Junior Attorney
characters.description: late-twenties man, nervous junior bank attorney, neat brown hair, clean-shaven, stiff black off-the-rack suit, thin blue tie, anxious wide eyes

characters.name: State Inspector
characters.description: forty-year-old woman, state agriculture soil inspector, brown hair in a practical ponytail, khaki field vest over a beige shirt, holding a clipboard, focused neutral expression
